zh.lifeSummary: 當Paule de Preuilly於1005年出生在法國崔英德-吉洛易洛斯普易利-素-可萊時，她的父親Gausbert de Preuilly31歲，母親Adèle du Bouchet28歲。她於1025年與Herbert Ier Éveille-Chien du Maine結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1036年4月13日享年31歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特勒 曼斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Paule
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Paulus, a Roman family name, originally a nickname meaning ‘small’, used in the post-classical period as a given name. Pre-eminently this is the name of the saint who is generally regarded, with St Peter , as co-founder of the Christian Church. Born in Tarsus, and originally named Saul, he was both a Roman citizen and a Jew, and at first found employment as a minor official persecuting Christians. He was converted to Christianity by a vision of Christ while on the road to Damascus, and thereafter undertook extensive missionary journeys, converting people, especially Gentiles, to Christianity all over the eastern Mediterranean. His preaching aroused considerable official hostility, and eventually he was beheaded at Rome in about ad 65 . He is the author of the fourteen epistles to churches and individuals which form part of the New Testament. It has been in continuous use in the British Isles since the 16th century.

variants.name: Paulus
meanings: From Latin Paulus, a Roman family name, originally a nickname meaning ‘small’, used in the post-classical period as a given name. Pre-eminently this is the name of the saint who is generally regarded, with St Peter , as co-founder of the Christian Church. Born in Tarsus, and originally named Saul, he was both a Roman citizen and a Jew, and at first found employment as a minor official persecuting Christians. He was converted to Christianity by a vision of Christ while on the road to Damascus, and thereafter undertook extensive missionary journeys, converting people, especially Gentiles, to Christianity all over the eastern Mediterranean. His preaching aroused considerable official hostility, and eventually he was beheaded at Rome in about ad 65 . He is the author of the fourteen epistles to churches and individuals which form part of the New Testament. It has been in continuous use in the British Isles since the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Paule de Preuilly was born in 1005, in Preuilly-sur-Claise, Loches, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, her father, Gausbert de Preuilly, was 31 and her mother, Adèle du Bouchet, was 28. She married Herbert Ier Éveille-Chien du Maine in 1025. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 13 April 1036, at the age of 31, and was buried in Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Paule de Preuilly est née en 1005, à Preuilly-sur-Claise, Loches, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, son père, Gausbert de Preuilly, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adèle du Bouchet, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert Ier Éveille-Chien du Maine en 1025. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1036, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

ko.lifeSummary: Paule de Preuilly(이)가 1005년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 럭스 플레우이리-수-클레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gausbert de Preuilly(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle du Bouchet(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1025년 Herbert Ier Éveille-Chien du Maine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1036년 4월 13일 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 일 먼스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Paule de Preuilly nasceu em 1005, em Preuilly-sur-Claise, Loches, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, seu pai, Gausbert de Preuilly, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adèle du Bouchet, tinha 28 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Paule de Preuilly родилась в 1005 г. в местности преуилли-сур-клеис, лочесь, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Gausbert de Preuilly было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adèle du Bouchet, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert Ier Éveille-Chien du Maine в 1025 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 13 апреля 1036 г. в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности л манс, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.
